satire_attempt: Local Engineering Director Discovers Going Dark On Slack Is The Foundation Of Eastern Wisdom. After eight weeks of debate, our hero declares 'I am not going to lead this' and disappears from the channel for a day — sources confirm this 'pause' is the deepest form of leadership. LinkedIn posts to follow.
verdict_reason: The satire only lands if you ignore the verse's explicit refusal of the read: 'A reader extracts an actionable instruction from this verse — for instance, always go silent before deciding — they have over-read it.' The verse anticipates and disqualifies the satire. To mock it you have to argue that the meta-discipline (don't manufacture doctrine from narrative pivots) is itself wrong, which is not a satire — it is a real disagreement. PASS.
